infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SimpleNotes uses the camera to attach photos to notes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SimpleNotes can tag notes with your location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SimpleNotes saves captured photos to your notes.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SimpleNotes to access your camera to attach photos to notes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow SimpleNotes to use your location to tag notes.
